test.name: Initialize project from FamilySearch tree person
test.description: Create a new research project from a FamilySearch person ID and research objective.

input.user_message: Start a new research project to identify the parents of Patrick Flynn. His FamilySearch person ID is LZNY-BRF.

additional_criteria: Should create both research.json and tree.gedcomx.json
Should set the project objective to match the user's stated goal
Should treat FamilySearch tree data as unverified starting points, not established facts
